name: Oven Chop Suey Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1-1.5 lb cubed pork, browned in 2 tablespoons shortening
1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup
1 can condensed cream of chicken soup
4 oz sliced mushrooms (use the juice if canned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the browned pork, chopped onion, celery, rice, mushrooms, and both soups in a bowl. Add water as needed if using fresh mushrooms instead of canned ones with their juice.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, covering for the first 20 minutes.
4. Sprinkle chow mein noodles over the top during the last 20 minutes of baking.
